name: lessmark-workspace
description: Workspace for Lessmark, a strict agent-readable document format.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace lessmark && cargo check --workspace
scripts.test: npm run test:js && npm run test:python && npm run test:rust
scripts.test:python: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:PYTHONPATH='packages/python/src'; python -m unittest discover packages/python/tests"
scripts.check: npm run build && npm test && npm run test:docs && npm run test:editors && npm run test:conformance
